title: D.A.V.E. Personality Data Files
description: Schemas for the JSON data files that define D.A.V.E.'s voice and behavior. The `version` field on each file is the personality version — bump it when meaningful changes are made to prompts or vocabulary, so deployments and tests can pin to a known set.

version.description: Semantic-ish personality version, e.g. 'v1', 'v1.2'. Bump on prompt or vocab changes.

emotion.description: The fixed emotion vocabulary. Mirrors EMOTION_KEYWORDS in mind/app.py.

moveToTarget.description: Valid named locations Dave can move to.

name.description: Short display name (e.g. 'D.A.V.E.'). Informational; not consumed by app.py.

fullName.description: Expanded display name (e.g. 'Digital Autonomous Virtual Entity'). Informational; not consumed by app.py.

systemPrompt.description: Dave's core personality prompt. Used as the leading system message for respond, browse-react, and muse handlers.

respondFormatPrompt.description: Directive for the respond handler's output shape: speech text followed by a JSON object with an `emotion` field on the last line. May also accept optional `gesture`, `posture`, `gaze`, `moveTo`.

musePreamble.description: Prefixed to a randomly selected muse prompt. Instructs Dave to respond with a JSON object {text, emotion}.

musePrompts.description: Short prompts Dave riffs on when bored. Randomly selected by the muse handler.

idlePrompt.description: Directive for the idle handler. Expects a JSON object {action, durationSec, text, emotion, gazeTarget}, where action is one of wander, idle, sit, laydown, look-around.

browsePickPrompt.description: Currently unused by code. Kept parallel for future browse-pick logic.

browseReactPrompt.description: Directive for the browse handler's reaction step. Tells Dave to react to a Reddit post in 1-2 sentences, in character.
